selected.reason: Captures a complete UI of the Huxe X profile page, including branding, follower count, and a post with visible content. It’s a clear, self-contained teaching artifact demonstrating the platform’s interface and personalized content feature, useful for verification and explanation.

dropped_summary: frame_0001.jpg shows a hand holding a phone with a news feed, but the content is partially obscured and blurry. It lacks clarity and complete visual information, making it less suitable as a teaching artifact compared to the clear, structured UI in frame_0002.jpg. Also, frame_0001 lacks distinct teaching content beyond a generic feed preview.
